latin: Vir pigerrimus, qui nihil aliud quam quietem et cerevisianum potum quaerebat, humeris sublatis dixit: 'ille Vir manet.'

questions.prompt: What kind of person is the Dude?
questions.target: Extremely lazy, seeking only peace and beer
choices: Extremely lazy, seeking only peace and beer

translation: The laziest man, who sought nothing other than peace and beer, shrugged his shoulders and said: 'The Dude abides.'
